leadText: The Yellow Scarf (Japanese: きいろのバンダナ Yellow Bandanna) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. It increases the holder's Toughness in a Pokémon Contest.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This section is incomplete. Please feel free to edit this section to add missing information and complete it. Reason: Check how much exactly is raised by this item in all generations When held by a Pokémon, it raises its Toughness in the primary round of a Pokémon Contest , the Visual Competition of a Super Contest , and the Introduction Round of a Contest Spectacular . In Generation III , it is raised by 20 points, up to a total of 255 points.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A hold item that raises Tough in Contests . FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . It boosts the holding Pok é mon 's Tough condition in Contests . Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the "Tough" aspect of the holder in a Contest. HG SS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the "Tough" aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the Tough aspect of the holder in a Contest. X Y An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a Contest, it raises the Tough aspect of the Pokémon holding it. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a contest, it raises the Tough aspect of the Pokémon holding it. BD SP An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a Super Contest Show, it raises the Toughness of the Pokémon holding it. S V When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even tougher than usual.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Slateport City Pokémon Fan Club (show chairman a Pokémon with Tough stat of 200 or more; in Japanese Pokémon Ruby and Sapphire, the required stat is Smart due to an error) FR LG Trade Colo XD Trade D P Pt Pastoria City (show Scarf Guy a Pokémon with Tough stat of 200 or more) HG SS Trade X Y Trade OR AS Slateport City Pokémon Fan Club (show chairman a Pokémon with Tough stat of 200 or more) BD SP Pastoria City (show Scarf Guy a Pokémon with Toughness stat of 200 or more)
